title: Yaeley Yaeley Maruthu Lyrics Pandiya Nadu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Yaeley yaeley maruthu
Music: D Imman
Singer(s): Suraj Santhosh
Lyrics:Vairamuthu
Movie: Pandiya Nadu

Yaeley yaeley maruthu
iva endha ooru karudhu ..
paaru paaru thanga thaeru thaeru
mela maasi veedhi varudhu (2)

Suthamulla uthami gunathukku
indha manam vilundhaachu
ava muthu pallu theriyum siripukku
motha usur paripochu  (yaeley Yaeley)

Vayasu kanniyo, manasu kadavulo
podava katti pogum pollaadha kulandhayo
sirutha ida pola en usuru vaadudhu
perutha kanam pola piriyamo koodudhu

Oru melliya megamaa poguraa
andha meenaachi kili ivadaa..
oru minnalin pillayaa paakuraa
ada en thaayin marumagalo  (yaeley yaeley)

Dharma dhevadhai karunai paarkayil
sagalam parakudhu srireeram marakudhu
aandu padhinettil anaivarkkum thaayadi
annai theresavin pethiyum neeyadi

endha pennodum yezhuvadhu kaamamey
adi unnodu thonalaye
siru mundhaanai moodidum dheivamey
unna muthaada thonalaye

Yaeley yaeley maruthu
iva endha ooru karudhu ..
paaru paaru thanga thaeru thaeru
mela maasi veedhi varudhu (2)

Suthamulla uthami gunathukku
indha manam vilundhaachu
ava muthu pallu theriyum siripukku
motha usur paripochu

Yaaro yaaro oruthi
munna poraa enna kadathi
aala kollum andha kolli kannil
usuroda enna koluthi...

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Yaeley Yaeley Maruthu celebrates the joy of life and the excitement of youth, reflecting a carefree spirit.

How does this song fit into the plot of Pandiya Nadu?

In Pandiya Nadu, this song showcases moments of celebration and happiness among the characters, enhancing the film's lively atmosphere.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Sooraj Santhosh and composed by D Imman, known for their vibrant collaboration.

When was Yaeley Yaeley Maruthu released?

The song was released on October 22, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaeley Yaeley Maruthu, the vibrant energy of the song mirrors the joyous moments in Pandiya Nadu. The lyrics, penned by Vairamuthu, evoke a sense of celebration and youthful exuberance, making it a perfect anthem for parties. Sooraj Santhosh's lively rendition, combined with D Imman's catchy music, creates an infectious vibe that resonates with listeners. This song encapsulates the essence of happiness and togetherness, inviting everyone to join in the fun.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaeley Yaeley Maruthu from the movie Pandiya Nadu is an energetic anthem that perfectly captures the spirit of celebration. With Sooraj Santhosh's vibrant vocals and D Imman's catchy composition, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Dive into the lively beats and let the joyous vibes take over your mood!
stanzaMeanings: This place is special, look, look, the golden boat is coming down the main street.
This pure heart has fallen for the qualities of a good person; her smile is like a pearl, and it brings joy to life.
Oh young girl, your heart is like a treasure; it can hold so much, just like a small child who is innocent and pure.
A soft cloud is passing by, that beautiful bird is here; a lightning bolt is watching, is this my mother's marriage?
In the sight of the divine, everything is blessed; the spirit of the year is not forgotten, and every mother is a blessing to her child.
Every girl is a desire, and you are my support; oh God, you are my only support, and you are my everything.
This place is special, look, look, the golden boat is coming down the main street.
This pure heart has fallen for the qualities of a good person; her smile is like a pearl, and it brings joy to life.
Who is going ahead, and what will happen to me? That fierce look in her eyes is taking my breath away...
